features.name: integer variable bit-indexing in while loop
features.description: Code should include a while loop in combinational logic that uses an integer (non-logic) variable to dynamically index into a bit vector, where the index is computed as width-1-loopVar

features.name: parameterized module with leading zero count using variable index
